query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Streaked bands of blue, gray, and muted gold sweep diagonally across the frame in flowing, parallel lines, suggesting the reflective surface of flowing water or the texture of brushed metal viewed in motion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Soft, flowing bands of blue, gray, and muted gold sweep diagonally across the frame with heavy intentional motion blur that dissolves all fine detail into streaked, parallel lines, creating an abstract composition where no recognizable subject materializes amid the muted, desaturated tones.
